title: ChatBlacklist++
description: Blacklist certain words or phrases in a server, refusing to send any messages containing them
body:
This plugin allows admins to blacklist any phrase from being written in chat, the blacklist is NOT case sensitive so proper capitalisation is unnecessary. 

# Commands

- /BlacklistPhrase <Phrase>
  - Requires input of the phrase to be blacklisted, and if the phrase is valid it will be repeated back to the command sender and added to the blacklist

- /UnblacklistPhrase
  - This command opens an exitable GUI containing every blacklisted phrase as feather items, when an item is clicked the phrase on the item shall be removed from the blacklist
  - This command can only be executed by a player as the GUI needs to be opened for a phrase to be removed from the blacklist

- /ClearBlacklist <Confirmation>
  - If inputted on as just "/ClearBlacklist" will return back with a message asking the user to confirm by reinputting the command with the input of "/ClearBlacklist confirm"
  - If inputted with "ClearBlacklist confirm" the blacklist will be wiped and started from scratch

- /ListBlacklist
  - Will send the user a list of every currently blacklisted phrase 


# Plans for the future

**None currently, I cannot think of a good update that is necessary to this plugin, if you have any suggestions make a forum, tweet at me (@note946) or dm me on discord (@note946) !**
